synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0886 Oracle Linux 8 lvm2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0886
description:
[2.03.14-15.0.1.el8_10.3]
- Fixed deletion issue for symlink when device is opened [Orabug: 36228608]
- Prevent duplicate uuid device to replace existing one in udev [Orabug: 35987487]
- Prevent duplicate label to replace existing one in udev [Orabug: 34898273]

[2.03.14-15.el8_10.3]
- Allow integrity to use multiple segments for metadata.
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0886

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0886.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
device-mapper-1.02.181-15.0.1.el8_10.3.x86_64.rpm
device-mapper-devel-1.02.181-15.0.1.el8_10.3.i686.rpm

aarch64:

lvm2-lockd-2.03.14-15.0.1.el8_10.3.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/lvm2-2.03.14-15.0.1.el8_10.3.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.03.14-15.0.1.el8_10.3]
- Fixed deletion issue for symlink when device is opened [Orabug: 36228608]
- Prevent duplicate uuid device to replace existing one in udev [Orabug: 35987487]
- Prevent duplicate label to replace existing one in udev [Orabug: 34898273]

[2.03.14-15.el8_10.3]
- Allow integrity to use multiple segments for metadata.
